Description:
This invoice is the final billing for the remainder of your maintenance agreement as per the cancellation clause.
 
Contract Quotation No: 128066
Contract Terms: 3 Years
Contract Annual Fee: $690.00 + GST
Contract Total Fee (Annual Fee * 3 Years): $2,070.00 + GST
 
Total Billed from Contract: $ 330.00 + GST (Refer to Tax Invoice #1500011835)
 
Total Balance from the Remainder of Contract: $1,740.00 + GST
 
EARLY CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT
If this agreement is cancelled prior to it's agreed end date Liverpool Fire Services reserve the right to invoice the client the balance of the agreement for which the client shall be held liable. This is due to pricing is calculated on the length of the agreement.
